descriptionEn: Name means "gift of God." He is the son of Amos and father of Joseph (not to be confused with Jesus' father or Jacob's son), a Judahite listed in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,

images.caption: Tomb of Mattathias ben Johanan, Israel. Photographed by Ariel Palmon.
